---
title: "Research Portfolio"
---

# Research Portfolio

The projects below represent the major research and software initiatives that define my current research program. They combine quantum sensing, experimental instrumentation, scientific software, and quantum control.

---

## Active Projects

### 🟢 NV Control Framework

A modular Python framework for controlling and automating diamond NV center experiments.

➡ **Status:** Active Development

[Open Project →](nv-control/index.qmd)

---

### 🟢 Microwave-Free Quantum Magnetic Imaging

Developing microwave-free magnetic imaging using high-density NV ensembles.

➡ Active Research

---

### 🟢 Event Camera Quantum Imaging

Developing ultrafast quantum magnetic imaging using neuromorphic event cameras.

➡ Active Research

---

### 🟡 Quantum Machines OPX Integration

Real-time experiment control and pulse programming.

➡ In Development
